_description: 海报生成提示词模板 (from CAT5_Factory generate_poster.cjs)
_protocol: 变更时更新此头部，然后检查 CLAUDE.md

styles.cyberpunk: cyberpunk neon city, dark tones, glowing accents
styles.minimal: minimalist professional, clean white space, modern typography
styles.warm: warm narrative, soft lighting, cozy atmosphere
styles.vibrant: vibrant energetic, bold colors, dynamic composition
styles.academic: scientific academic, clean layout, data visualization feel
styles.bold: bold disruptive, high contrast, striking composition
styles.organic: natural organic, earth tones, handcrafted feel

prompt_template: The text "{text}" must be clearly visible and legible on a {placement}. Rendered with high clarity, sharp edges, perfect spelling. Style: {style}, 8K resolution, sharp focus on text elements.
negative_prompt: NO AI blue (#4169E1), NO electric blue, NO neon purple (#8A2BE2), NO blurry text, NO misspelled text, NO illegible text, NO watermarks

usage_example.prompt: The text "AI不是在改变生活，它在重写规则" must be clearly visible and legible on a neon sign. Rendered with high clarity, sharp edges, perfect spelling. Style: cyberpunk neon city, dark tones, glowing accents, 8K resolution, sharp focus on text elements.
usage_example.negative: NO AI blue, NO electric blue, NO neon purple, NO blurry text
